ChukaCribs Project Status: ✅ COMPLETE

Project: Student-focused accommodation website for Chuka
- Frontend: Fully responsive HTML/CSS/JS with animations
- Backend: Express server with house listing API routes
- Database Models: House, Booking, Token schemas
- Features: Token-based access (100 KSH), multimedia support, search/filter
- SEO: Optimized for Chuka-related searches
- Animations: Professional transitions and effects throughout

Start the project:
- Development: npm run dev
- Production: npm start
- Visit: http://localhost:3000
